Utterances.Utterance: I'd like to make a reservation for tonight.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I'd like to make a reservation for tonight.)
Ask_Party_Size (Agent: I can help with that. For how many people?)
Provide_Party_Size (User: A table for four, please.)
Ask_Time (Agent: And what time would you like to come in?)
Provide_Time (User: Do you have anything available at 7:30 PM?)
Check_Availability_State
Confirm_Reservation (Agent: Yes, I have a table for four at 7:30 PM. I've booked that for you.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: We look forward to seeing you tonight!)

Utterances.Utterance: I need to cancel my reservation for tomorrow.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I need to cancel my reservation for tomorrow.)
Ask_Name (Agent: I can assist with that. What is the name on the reservation?)
Provide_Name (User: It's under John Doe.)
Find_Reservation_State
Confirm_Cancellation (Agent: I found your reservation for John Doe. I have cancelled it as requested.)
Goodbye_State (User: Thanks for your help.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. Have a good day.)

Utterances.Utterance: I want to change the time of my reservation.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I want to change the time of my reservation.)
Ask_Details (Agent: I can help you modify that. What is the name on the booking and the new time you'd like?)
Provide_Details (User: It's for Jane Smith, and I'd like to change it to 8:00 PM instead of 7:00.)
Check_Availability_State
Confirm_Modification (Agent: I have successfully moved Jane Smith's reservation to 8:00 PM.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Thank you. See you then!)

Utterances.Utterance: Can you confirm the details of my reservation?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: Can you confirm the details of my reservation?)
Ask_Identifier (Agent: Sure. What is the phone number or name associated with the reservation?)
Provide_Identifier (User: My phone number is 555-1234.)
Find_Reservation_State
Provide_Details (Agent: I see a reservation for a party of 2 on Friday at 6:30 PM under your number.)
Goodbye_State (User: Perfect, that's what I needed. Thanks.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. Have a great day!)
